title: Use cell edges data in `check`, improve messages

features.name: logic loop through inverted wire feedback
features.description: Code should include a wire defined as inversion of a bit that feeds back into the same bit through reduction operations

features.name: concatenation with replication
features.description: Code should include a concatenation with replication operator where a signal is replicated N times

features.name: reduction and assignment using concatenation
features.description: Code should include a wire assignment using reduction AND operation on a concatenation of multiple values
